picks.why: She thanked Musk for saving America — weeks before she began claiming his companies threaten humanity.
23 million people saw this. She ridiculed anyone who didn’t trust Elon Musk with their Social Security number. 36,000 likes.
She wrote that Musk has “an incredible vision for humanity” and said she couldn’t thank him enough for transforming the platform he owns.
Not a reply. Not a retweet. Her own words: “Elon Musk is the greatest war general in modern history.”
A direct reply to @elonmusk: “Time to save America.”
